entries.quote: AI will be used very effectively when we look at the next wave of UPI, and that includes all aspects, including reaching new users
entries.signal: NPCI leadership is pivoting UPI growth strategy toward AI for fraud prevention, credit distribution on UPI, and voice-based onboarding—directly shaping how credit cards and embedded credit compete in real-time payments. RuPay credit cards on UPI (three-second payments per NPCI messaging) will benefit from AI-driven user acquisition and fraud guardrails.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] NPCI is prioritizing AI agents and voice multilingual UPI interfaces to add 500M new users; believes fintech/bank credit distribution within UPI is core. This is regulatory greenlight for credit-on-UPI competitors.

entries.quote: AI will be used very effectively when we look at the next wave of UPI, and that includes all aspects, including reaching new users. We must use AI effectively to protect our current citizens, to find fraud, and to find mules. AI must also be used to provide credit to all the users and merchants who have digital footprints.
entries.signal: NPCI is aggressively pushing AI-driven credit distribution and fraud controls on UPI — a direct enabler for credit-on-UPI products; Asbe sees credit as core to reaching the next half-billion users, a strategic bet that undercuts traditional credit-card models if successfully embedded in UPI rails.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] NPCI is committed to making UPI a credit platform, not just a payments platform. This signals long-term intention to commoditize credit delivery at scale, which directly competes with co-brand credit cards (like Scapia) unless they integrate into the UPI-AI-credit ecosystem.

entries.quote: We must have a regulatory framework for the agentic (world) and once that's there, we can look at the orderly kind of implementation of use cases. As a country, we must have an open mind and allow some experimentation, the creation of use cases using the agentic (technologies) because it creates a leverage for the user and merchant.
entries.signal: NPCI chief calling for RBI/regulatory guardrails around AI-driven payments systems; signals openness to innovation within controlled framework—relevant for Scapia's fintech strategy and credit-on-UPI expansion.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes AI-driven agents in payments require regulatory sandboxing; NPCI is actively building agentic use cases (FiMI language model reaching 1M monthly users) and seeking regulatory clarity to scale responsibly.

entries.quote: We must have a regulatory framework for the agentic (world) and once that's there, we can look at the orderly kind of implementation of use cases
entries.signal: NPCI actively pursuing AI-driven transaction automation and agent-to-agent banking flows—pushing regulators to enable faster fintech integration at scale
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes agentic AI will drive next-phase UPI growth; sees regulatory clarity as enabler, not blocker
